steps.title: Find one dimension from given info
steps.content:
The slant $AB = 32$, the height $h = 16$, and the radius $r$ form a right triangle (apex $A$, center of base, point $B$ on the rim). Apply Pythagoras:
$$r^2 = AB^2 - h^2 = 32^2 - 16^2 = 1024 - 256 = 768$$

steps.title: Compute the requested value
steps.content:
Use the cone-volume formula $V = \tfrac{1}{3}\pi r^2 h$:
$$V = \tfrac{1}{3}\pi(768)(16) = \pi(256)(16) = 4096\pi$$
So $k = 4096$. The answer is 4096.
